description: Content + build tracker for the AChat (Anonymous Chat AI) documentation site. Resumable across sessions: the first section with status != 'complete' is the next thing to work on.
sourceOfTruth: AChat app source + README + CLAUDE.md (../achatai). Every fact must come from the real app — no invented features.
honestFraming: AChat has NO AI/LLM feature despite its brand name; open chats are not private; file bytes are not encrypted at rest; deletion is ~10 days not instant. These limits are documented explicitly.

sections.title: robots.txt + llms.txt + sitemap + JSON-LD + OG card

runHistory.summary: Created the site from the native-update-docs template structure. Wrote all 17 doc pages (intro, getting-started x2, features x8, concepts x3, faq, changelog, about) documenting every real AChat feature with honest limits. SEO/AEO infra: AI-bot-allowlist robots.txt, llms.txt, sitemap (Docusaurus), WebSite+Organization+SoftwareApplication JSON-LD, 1200x630 OG card. Dual hosting (Firebase + GitHub Pages). yarn install + yarn build verified.

resumeInstructions: 1) cd achatai-docs. 2) yarn install. 3) yarn build (must exit 0). 4) To extend: add a section to sidebars.ts + a docs/*.md page sourced from the real app; keep honest framing; bump lastUpdated; ONE commit. Re-emit sitemap on build (Docusaurus does this automatically).
